lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows moderate wear and staining on the upholstery. Major mechanical systems are operational, but the vehicle requires routine maintenance.
Good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. There is visible rust on the body panels, and the interior has sustained heavy wear over the years. Mechanically, the car suffers from a failing suspension system and a persistent exhaust leak. It is being sold as-is and is best suited for someone looking for a project car or a source of parts.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches and some clear coat peeling on the roof and trunk. Inside, the upholstery has some visible wear and staining, though all essential features remain functional. Mechanically, it starts and runs reliably, but it could benefit from a tune-up in the near future.

Looking for a reliable ride that offers fantastic value? This vehicle is a solid, dependable performer that’s ready for its next chapter! It shows some honest character and typical wear for its age, but it still drives well and has plenty of life left in it. Perfect for anyone seeking a functional car at a great price point!
This vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission function properly. The interior shows normal signs of use, and the exterior has a few small scratches but no major damage.

Presented for your consideration is an impeccably maintained vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile—from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior upholstery—reflects a standard of care that meets the most discerning expectations. Mechanically robust and aesthetically perfect, this offering represents a premier acquisition for the serious enthusiast who demands nothing less than excellence.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this car is in such incredible shape, it still looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one—always garaged and kept spotless. It drives like an absolute dream and is looking for a new home where it'll be just as loved. You really have to see it to believe how pristine it is. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This FD3S chassis exemplifies peak 90s JDM engineering, maintained in showroom condition. Under the hood, the 13B-REW rotary engine retains its factory sequential twin-turbo configuration, delivering a linear power band and exceptional throttle response. The drivetrain features a crisp 5-speed manual gearbox paired with a Torsen limited-slip differential. Mechanically flawless, the vehicle boasts a perfect 50/50 weight distribution, supported by an untouched double-wishbone suspension setup and four-piston calipers. Zero chassis oxidation and pristine compression numbers across both rotors. A true collector-grade example for the purist seeking unadulterated rotary performance.
Immaculate condition. Garage stored. Zero mechanical issues. Clean title.

This vehicle is an absolute masterpiece of preservation, maintained to a standard that rivals its first day on the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a recent ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition, featuring supple leather seats that show no signs of wear, a crystal-clear premium infotainment system, and that distinct new-car scent. Mechanically, it is flawless; every service has been performed ahead of schedule at certified dealerships, with a comprehensive paper trail to prove its pampered history. Garage-kept and never driven in inclement weather, this car represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to a peerless standard. This specimen exhibits showroom-level integrity, both mechanically and aesthetically. Every detail reflects meticulous stewardship, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. An acquisition for the discerning collector who demands nothing short of perfection.

We are pleased to present this superlative specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard. Every facet of this vehicle, from the pristine exterior finish to the immaculate cabin, reflects a legacy of meticulous preservation. This is a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade vehicle in showroom condition, offering a mechanical and aesthetic experience that is truly peerless.

Hey everyone! 🚗✨ I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total stunner! This beauty is in truly mint condition—it’s been garage-kept, meticulously cared for, and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It drives like an absolute dream and still has that fresh, new-car feel. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and looks flawless, this is the one! Come see it for yourself before it’s gone!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the high-revving S54 platform, featuring a meticulously maintained 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies. The mechanical provenance is fully documented, including a proactive rod bearing replacement and a comprehensive Beisan Systems VANOS overhaul. Power is managed via a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential, providing an unfiltered analog driving experience. The chassis has been structurally reinforced at the subframe mounting points to mitigate fatigue, and the suspension retains its original geometry with refreshed bushings and dampers. Presented in showroom condition with flawless paint depth and a pristine Nappa leather interior, this vehicle represents a collector-grade opportunity for the discerning enthusiast.
2021 Luxury Sedan. Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Original paint. Pristine interior. Low mileage. Full service records available.

This vehicle is a breathtaking 'time capsule' specimen, preserved in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously kept in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior paint boasts a deep, mirror-like factory finish entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. The interior is equally impeccable, featuring supple, uncreased leather, pristine carpets, and that signature new-car scent; it has never been smoked in and shows zero wear on the bolsters or touchpoints. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous, documented maintenance schedule at authorized service centers since day one. Every switch, dial, and electronic feature operates with precision. With exceptionally low mileage and a flawless undercarriage, this car drives with the tightness and responsiveness of a brand-new vehicle. Complete with all original manuals,

Presented for your consideration is a superlative vehicle of unrivaled pedigree, maintained to the most exacting showroom standards. This motorcar represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly impeccable condition, devoid of blemish or mechanical compromise. Every detail, from the pristine upholstery to the flawless exterior finish, reflects a history of meticulous stewardship. We invite the discerning buyer to experience a level of automotive integrity that is increasingly difficult to secure in the pre-owned market.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest possible standards. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a showroom-grade specimen with an impeccable service history and uncompromising aesthetic integrity. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to automotive excellence. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle stands as a definitive benchmark in its class.

Hey there! I am absolutely thrilled to be listing this absolute beauty today. Honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor—it's in truly pristine, like-new condition! I've taken such good care of it, and it really shows in every little detail. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions, I'd love to chat and help you get behind the wheel!

This meticulously preserved E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 inline-six powerplant with individual throttle bodies and a perfectly synchronized double-VANOS system. The chassis remains in exceptional condition, with verified subframe integrity and factory-spec bushings ensuring razor-sharp handling. Power is delivered through a crisp, short-throw transmission to a high-locking limited-slip differential. Every mechanical component, from the high-pressure fuel system to the cross-drilled rotors, functions within original tolerances. The exterior showcases flawless paint depth and zero curb rash on the forged alloys, while the interior remains free of bolster wear or plastic degradation. A true collector-grade specimen for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Original paint. Interior spotless. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, presented in impeccable condition that mirrors its original delivery day. Every inch of the exterior retains a deep, mirror-like gloss, free of swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, thanks to a life spent in a climate-controlled garage and a recent professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains untouched by time; the premium leather seats are supple without a single crease, and the dashboard remains factory-fresh with every electronic component functioning exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is peerless. It has been maintained with an open-checkbook policy, documented by a comprehensive, chronological service portfolio. The engine bay is spotless, and the undercarriage shows no signs of road wear or environmental exposure. Included with the sale are all original keys, factory owner’s manuals, and a custom-fitted car cover. This is a rare opportunity to own a specimen that looks, smells, and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this peerless example of automotive excellence. Maintained to a showroom standard, this vehicle exhibits no discernible wear, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. For the discerning individual who demands nothing short of perfection, this specimen offers an uncompromising aesthetic and mechanical profile that commands attention.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber, maintained to a standard that exceeds even the most rigorous expectations. This vehicle presents in showroom condition, exhibiting a pristine aesthetic and mechanical integrity that will satisfy the most exacting collector. Every detail has been preserved with meticulous care, resulting in a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. An acquisition of this magnitude represents a rare opportunity for the discerning individual to secure an investment-grade asset of uncompromising quality.

Hey there! You've got to see this absolute gem. I've babied this car since day one, and it's still in total mint condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just left the showroom floor! It’s been garage-kept, meticulously maintained, and is ready for its next adventure. If you're looking for perfection without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Offering a concours-level E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six. This specimen boasts a flawless double-VANOS system and recently serviced rod bearings, ensuring peak rotational harmony up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with a reinforced rear subframe and a variable M-differential for superior lateral dynamics. Finished in museum-quality condition with zero deferred maintenance, the chassis remains stiff and responsive, supported by refreshed bushings and a precise steering rack. A mechanically impeccable, turn-key investment for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior and interior. Low mileage. Full service history available. No mechanical issues.

Presented in showroom condition, this vehicle is a pristine example of automotive excellence. Meticulously maintained by a single owner and kept in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, swirl-free luster while the interior remains in an impeccable state, still carrying that new-car aroma. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at certified dealerships, with full documentation provided. From the flawless alloy wheels to the untouched leather upholstery, no detail has been overlooked. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade vehicle that performs as flawlessly as it looks.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and preserved in pristine, showroom condition. This motorcar represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an unblemished exterior and a cabin that retains its original factory luster. A rare acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection in both aesthetics and mechanical integrity.
